title: Agrifood Policy Conference [Advocacy Lab]
summary_full: Shaping Europe’s trade, competitiveness and sustainable food future 09:30 – 09:45 PLENARY: Europe’s agrifood sector: Balancing competitiveness, sustainability and trust As Europe navigates new trade agreements, including the Mercosur deal, and addresses ongoing challenges in the food supply chain, questions arise over market access, tariffs, and fair competition for European producers.
